description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports rich text formatting and threading.

channel_id.description: ID of the channel in format Cxxxxxxxxxx or its name starting with #... or @... (e.g. #general or @username).

text.description: Message text in markdown format. Example: 'Hello, world!' or '# Heading\n\nBody text'.

thread_ts.description: Timestamp of a thread's parent message in format 1234567890.123456. Optional — if not provided the message is posted to the channel itself.
